description:
## Bug

Auto-mode agents call `gh pr merge --squash` when attempting to merge PRs, ignoring the `prMergeStrategy: "merge"` setting in `.automaker/settings.json`. This causes merges to fail with:

```
GraphQL: Squash merges are not allowed on this repository. (mergePullRequest)
```

The feature then lands in `blocked` state and requires manual intervention.

## Evidence

- helixir PR #53 (P0-001: Fix LICENSE copyright holder) was blocked by this exact failure
- Feature status history shows: `"Merge failed: Command failed: gh pr merge 53 --squash\nGraphQL: Squash merges are not allowed on this repository."`
- `.automaker/settings.json` has `"prMergeStrategy": "merge"` set correctly

## Fix Required

The PR merge step in the agent workflow must read `prMergeStrategy` from settings and pass the correct flag:
- `"merge"` → `gh pr merge --merge`
- `"squash"` → `gh pr merge --squash`
- `"rebase"` → `gh pr merge --rebase`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Agent reads `prMergeStrategy` from `.automaker/settings.json` before calling `gh pr merge`
- [ ] Correct merge flag is passed based on the setting
- [ ] No more features blocked due to wrong merge strategy
title: bug: auto-mode uses --squash merge despite prMergeStrategy: merge setting

descriptionHistory.description:
## Bug

Auto-mode agents call `gh pr merge --squash` when attempting to merge PRs, ignoring the `prMergeStrategy: "merge"` setting in `.automaker/settings.json`. This causes merges to fail with:

```
GraphQL: Squash merges are not allowed on this repository. (mergePullRequest)
```

The feature then lands in `blocked` state and requires manual intervention.

## Evidence

- helixir PR #53 (P0-001: Fix LICENSE copyright holder) was blocked by this exact failure
- Feature status history shows: `"Merge failed: Command failed: gh pr merge 53 --squash\nGraphQL: Squash merges are not allowed on this repository."`
- `.automaker/settings.json` has `"prMergeStrategy": "merge"` set correctly

## Fix Required

The PR merge step in the agent workflow must read `prMergeStrategy` from settings and pass the correct flag:
- `"merge"` → `gh pr merge --merge`
- `"squash"` → `gh pr merge --squash`
- `"rebase"` → `gh pr merge --rebase`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Agent reads `prMergeStrategy` from `.automaker/settings.json` before calling `gh pr merge`
- [ ] Correct merge flag is passed based on the setting
- [ ] No more features blocked due to wrong merge strategy
